education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed production AI agent system for B2B order processing using Claude Sonnet and RAG architecture, implementing intelligent software across multi-channel interfaces (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone) serving 7 enterprise clients and processing 1,000+ orders

Engineered Python and React internal tooling for operational workflows including Intercom ticketing integration (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 data storage managing 250+ files

Implemented machine learning quality assurance pipeline with automated output validation and human-in-the-loop feedback; optimized AI model performance through prompt engineering and vector-store correction memory, improving precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern

Executed data migration and processing across 7+ legacy dashboards spanning 3 active Grafana environments with comprehensive unit testing on the dashboard layer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern

projects.name: Internship Matcher | React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude AI, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3

Designed dual-model AI pipeline using Claude (Haiku 4.5 for rapid skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for intelligent re-ranking of top 30 to top 10 candidates) achieving 95%+ accuracy with SSE-streamed real-time progress events to frontend
Optimized machine learning inference with parallel data processing across 30+ positions, achieving 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) through dynamic batching and prompt caching techniques

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring | React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets
bullets: Built automated machine learning platform for PSG sleep-stage classification achieving 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy, validated against clinician-labeled data from Sleep-EDF dataset
Engineered asynchronous data processing pipeline using Python (Redis + ARQ): distributed EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction, and Scikit-Learn ML classifiers with per-patient model training
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming architecture delivering real-time EEG waveform data and ML predictions to React dashboard for quality assurance review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent | FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet AI, Cal.com, Linq, PostgreSQL

Integrated multi-service AI system: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 API booking, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude AI (Haiku + Sonnet) on async PostgreSQL with Alembic data migrations and APScheduler
Delivered production AI software system auto-booking qualified leads via Cal.com integration, saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach through intelligent automation
